# Transformer Core {#part-transformer-core .unnumbered}

This part builds the transformer block from its major components.
The chapters move from one attention head to a full block that can be stacked into a GPT model.

- In @sec-ch06-attention, each token learns which other tokens to read from.
- In @sec-ch07-rope, position moves inside the attention score through rotary position encoding.
- In @sec-ch08-multi-head-attention, several attention patterns run in parallel.
- In @sec-ch09-feed-forward, each token representation is transformed by a position-wise neural network.
- In @sec-ch10-transformer-block, attention, feed-forward layers, residual connections, and normalization become one reusable block.
